text:
今回は……、
フォトンスケイルについて。
フォトンスケイルは、青い光沢を帯びた鉱石。

……見た目も美しいけど、触り心地がたまらない。
つるつると滑らかで、いつまでも撫でてしまう……フフ。

……ほかの鉱石と同じように、
装備の強化に使うことができる。

……南リテムへ行けば、見つかるはずさ。
試しに、探しに行くとい
Alright, then. I'll fill you in.
This time I'll tell you about Photon scales.
Photon scales are minerals that have a blue lustre to them.

They're beautiful to look at, of course, but they also have an amazing texture.
They're so silky smooth. I love the texture.
Photon scales are for enhancing equipment, just like other minerals.

You should be able to find some in South Retem.
Go on and see what you can turn up.
